{{Quote|Dane and I are from the Inner Core world of Thracior. We grew up in peaceful times, but five years ago the warlords of Thracior began to argue over territory.|Floria|<ref name="Trail" />}}
'''Thracior''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was home to a clan-based culture. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the planet's [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] began arguing over territory, leading to raids between the local tribes. As a result, the [[Parent/Legends|parents]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] siblings [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]] and [[Floria]], who were [[Marriage/Legends|married]] despite being from different clans, were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Dane and Floria escaped death and subsequently moved to a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Floria told [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] about her and Dane's past at Thracior.

==Description==
Thracior was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Tantt">{{CSWECite|III|218|Tantt clan}}</ref> located in the [[Thracior system/Legends|Thracior system]]. It was a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|Raids began between the different tribes. My mother was a Hnsi, my father a Tantt. They were killed because they intermarried. The Hnsis burned our house down and killed our baby sister. Dane and I escaped.|Floria|<ref name="Trail" />}}
[[File:Outboundflight_Anakin1.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Floria told Anakin Skywalker (pictured) about her and her brother's past at Thracior.]]
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] siblings [[Floria]],<ref name="Trail" /> who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]],<ref name="FloriaDate">''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', which is set in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] per ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', establishes that [[Floria]] is around fourteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the time of its events.</ref> and her slightly older [[Gender/Legends|brother]] [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]] grew up at Thracior, in the family of a man from<ref name="Trail" /> the [[Tantt]] clan<ref name="CSWE Tantt" /> and a woman from the [[Hnsi]]<ref name="Trail" /> clan.<ref name="CSWE Tantt" /> The family lived in a house, with Dane and Floria growing up in peaceful times.<ref name="Trail" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="ThraciorDate">''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', which is set in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] per ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', establishes that the [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] of Thracior began arguing over territory five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier.</ref> however, [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] at Thracior commenced arguing over territory, giving rise to raids between the planet's tribes. Due to the inter-clan [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]] of Dane and Floria's [[Parent/Legends|parents]], the latter were [[Death/Legends|killed]], with their house being [[Fire/Legends|burned]] down and their younger daughter also being killed. Dane and Floria were able to escape, and eventually, having lost everything, they moved to a [[Space station/Legends|space station]].<ref name="Trail" />

[[27 BBY/Legends|Five years]] later, while [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], on<ref name="Trail" /> the Core Worlds<ref name="TEA Ragoon">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Ragoon system/Legends|Ragoon system]]</ref> planet [[Ragoon VI]], Floria—who, together with Dane, had become [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]—initially pretended while talking to Skywalker to be from the nearby planet [[Aaeton]]. Later, however, after the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had discovered the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunters' ruse, Floria admitted her lie and relayed to Skywalker her and her brother's upbringing and subsequent escape from Thracior.<ref name="Trail" />

==Inhabitants==
Thracior was home to a culture that organized itself into clans,<ref name="CSWE" /> including the Hnsi and Tantt clans,<ref name="CSWE Tantt" /> and featured different tribes as well as warlords. It was home to the Human siblings Dane and Floria.<ref name="Trail" />

==Behind the scenes==
Thracior was first mentioned in [[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi|''The Trail of the Jedi'']], [[Jude Watson]]'s [[2002]] second installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest]]'' young-reader novel series.<ref name="Trail" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Thracior [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-12.<ref name="TEA" /> Although ''The Trail of the Jedi''<ref name="Trail" /> and later also Thracior's entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' had placed the planet in the "Inner Core,"<ref name="CSWE" /> ''The Essential Atlas'' overrode that placement by establishing the term as a synonym for the [[Arrowhead]] region, which it placed Thracior outside of.<ref name="TEA" />
